title: Pyxelated's QOL
description: This is for the pvpers who want some QOL in pvp without losing frames
body:
A lightweight pixel perfect ;) modpack built for competitive PvPers who want better quality-of-life features without sacrificing frames.
(Also i havent made any of these mods i just put them in a modpack so you don't have to go through the pain of downloading each one)

Please support these creators whose mod's/textures I have used in this modpack, Thank you :)
- [https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
- [https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
